name: Veal Adriana
recipeInstructions:
Veal:
1 pound Veal, cut into scaloppine and pounded to an even thickness
1/4 cup White Wine
1/4 cup Chicken Broth
1/4 cup Flour
1/4 cup Brown Gravy
Parsley, chopped
Mustard Sauce:
3 tbsp Dijon Mustard
Salt (to taste)
1 medium Lemon, juice
White Pepper (to taste)
6 oz Heavy Cream
1. Mix all ingredients for the mustard sauce in a bowl to form a smooth sauce.
2. Lightly flour the veal slices.
3. In a saute pan, warm oil and saute the veal for 1 minute on each side.
4. Drain off the oil and add wine to the pan (do not cover the veal with wine). Bring the liquid to a boil, then lower the heat and add chicken broth, brown gravy, and mustard sauce. Add chopped parsley and simmer for 3 to 4 minutes.
5. Remove the veal slices from the pan and arrange them onto a serving dish.
6. If the sauce is too thick, add a little broth; if it's too thin, add some cream. Heat the sauce well and pour it liberally over the veal.
7. Garnish the dish with chopped parsley.
